title: acaena trifida var. quinquefida
intro: Acaena trifida var. quinquefida, also known as five-leafed or New Zealand thyme, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand and Australia. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acaena trifida var. quinquefida include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Acaena trifida var. quinquefida is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
